AFC EAST.description: Safe haven for Bostonians and Patriots fans; clam chowder ("chowdah") for $10; known fact that this is THE Patriots bar

NFC EAST.description: SoMa; Cowboys contingent gathers here; also Raiders bar

NFC EAST.name: Ace's
NFC EAST.description: Nob Hill/Downtown; also NY Knicks bar per GameWatch

NFC EAST.name: Jake's Steaks
NFC EAST.description: Marina bar specializing in Philly cheesesteaks; draws deep bench of Eagles fans; Coors Light $3/pint during games, Bud Light bucket 6 for $15

NFC EAST.name: George and Walt's
NFC EAST.description: Rockridge, Oakland; Eagles fans gather in lounge with sound on; woman-owned, open 75+ years

NFC NORTH.name: Green's Sports Bar
NFC NORTH.description: Russian Hill/Polk area; true classic sports bar, might get busy when Packers play; draft beers; windows open onto Polk Street; autographed framed photos on walls

NFC WEST.name: The Boardroom
NFC WEST.address: 1609 Powell St (updated: 1600 Powell St after merger with Capp's Corner), San Francisco, CA 94133
NFC WEST.description: North Beach; now merged with former Capp's Corner location; added more TVs, outdoor seating, pool table, bigger bar snacks menu including signature bacon-wrapped tater tots; Tequila Trivia Tuesdays at 7:30 PM

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Danny Coyle's
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Haight-Ashbury; also Falcons and Chargers

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Splash at Thrive City
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Outside Chase Center (Warriors arena); 840 sq ft curved LED screen, real-time sports ticker, cocktails by Kevin Diedrich (Pacific Cocktail Haven), elevated food menu beyond burgers/pizza (sushi, lasagna), high-energy tech-forward space

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: The Boardroom
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: North Beach; bacon-wrapped tater tots, pool table, many TVs

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Hockey Haven
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Outer Richmond; opened 1949; not actually hockey-focused but name stuck for luck; 5 big TVs with sports on constantly, cheap drinks, standard pub grub, cast of regulars

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Yancy's Saloon
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Inner Sunset; local hangout for college students; darts, free popcorn, lenient outside food policy, plenty of TVs, local vibes

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Valley Tavern
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Noe Valley; 39 beers on tap, grill on back patio, 17 TVs inside + 6 on tiered outdoor patio, comfortable neighborhood sports bar

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: O'Brien's Irish Pub
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Outer Sunset; upscale food and drink; happy hour 4-6 PM weekdays; weekend brunch with bottomless mimosas $22; Irish breakfast with sausage, rashers, black and white pudding

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Rocks Den
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Excelsior District; pool tables and TVs; also cocktail destination (Dark and Stormy)

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Hi-Tops
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Gay sports bar; jam-packed with TVs, always popping during games, amazing nachos, mixed crowd, welcoming atmosphere

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Philosopher's Club
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Solid locals ambience, always has games on

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: The Athletic Club Oakland
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: **Best catch-all sports bar in East Bay**; official bar partner for Oakland Roots & Soul soccer and Oakland Ballers baseball; shows every game live, hosts all away game watch parties; all local draft beers; Oakland sports legend-themed cocktails (Vida Blue, Don Nelson); big booths; loaded food menu (crisscut fries, tempura cauliflower); St. Mary's Gaels crowd; brunch with chicken and waffles

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Mad Oak Bar 'N' Yard
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: 40 draft lines (primarily local beers/cider), quality cocktails, outdoor picnic tables, ballpark nachos, street tacos, mushroom fritters; games on many TVs (sound usually off); sprawling rooftop deck; DJs take over at night; Tuesday-Friday happy hour

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: The Kingfish Pub & Cafe
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Temescal; **over 100 years old** (first opened as bait shop serving beer); physically moved across the street in 2014; Cal sports museum atmosphere; outdoor patio turns into Bears football big-screen watch party on Saturdays; epic hot dogs and burgers

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: George & Walt's
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Rockridge; woman-owned oasis, open 75+ years; unmistakable neon outline sign; great food (chicken Parm sando, oxtail grilled cheese with tots); lively NFL Sundays, Warriors games with OG fans

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Yeti Sports Bar
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: **ONLY Bay Area spot with classic sports bar vibe + top-notch Himalayan food**; chicken momo dumplings, Nepalese pineapple fried rice, burgers, butterfly shrimp, wings, garlic Yeti fries; room wrapped in TVs

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Cali's Sports Bar
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Opened May 2024; diversely minded space for UFC and all major sports; NY-, Detroit-, and Sicilian-style pizzas; 2 big projection screens + dozen TVs; two full bars; transforms into hip-hop venue in evening with VIP bottle service

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: McGee's
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Alameda; **best sports bar in Alameda**; open since 1977; welcoming no-frills watering hole; over a dozen TVs; outdoor dining patio; live music on weekends; rotating food: Paisano's Italian wings/pizza/sandos and Areito Latino's Puerto Rican tostones/tacos/Salzon smash burger

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Stadium Pub
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Walnut Creek; **oldest sports bar in Walnut Creek**; cheap straightforward drinks and drafts; bar food favorites and signature Chicago-style dogs; Sundays: breakfast + football with $9 Hail Mary Bloody

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Primo's Pizzeria & Pub
ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.description: Danville; **best family-friendly sports bar**; signature pizzas (GF, dairy-free, cauliflower crust); many salads; 39 TVs indoors and on handsome outdoor patio; 35 beers on draft (5 new ones added weekly)

ADDITIONAL TOP SPORTS BARS.name: Fairway Zone Sports Bar and Lounge
